info.title: Smart Presence Backend
info.description: Smart Presence Backend API - CPU-optimized for low-power systems. Local SQLite + InsightFace.

schema.title: Response Read Organizations Api V1 Organizations  Get
Response Read Groups Api V1 Groups  Get
Response Delete Group Api V1 Groups  Group Id  Delete
Response Read Group Students Api V1 Groups  Group Id  Students Get
Response Read Group Timetable Api V1 Groups  Group Id  Timetable Get
Response Read Staff Api V1 Staff  Get
Response Delete Staff Api V1 Staff  Staff Id  Delete
Response Read Students Api V1 Students  Get
Response Delete Student Api V1 Students  Student Id  Delete
Response Read Timetable Api V1 Timetable  Get
Response Delete Timetable Entry Api V1 Timetable  Entry Id  Delete

post.description: Start a new attendance scanning session for a group.

schema.title: Response Start Session Api V1 Attendance Start Post

get.description: Get the current attendance session status.

schema.title: Response Get Status Api V1 Attendance Status Get

post.description: Stop the scanning phase, move to VERIFYING.

schema.title: Response Stop Scanning Api V1 Attendance Stop Post

post.description: Apply manual adjustments (add present, remove present).

schema.title: Response Verify Attendance Api V1 Attendance Verify Post

post.description: Finalize the session and persist attendance records to DB.

schema.title: Response Finalize Session Api V1 Attendance Finalize Post

get.description: Get attendance session history for a staff member over the past 7 days.

schema.title: Response Get Weekly History Api V1 Attendance History Weekly  Staff Id  Get

post.description: Register a face embedding for a student.

schema.title: Response Register Face Api V1 Recognition Register Face Post

post.description: Clear ALL face embeddings from the vector store and reset face_data_registered flags.

schema.title: Response Clear All Faces Api V1 Recognition Clear Faces Post

post.description: Recognize faces in an image frame. Returns matches with student IDs and bounding boxes.

schema.title: Response Recognize Face Api V1 Recognition Recognize Post

get.description: Aggregate institutional statistics for the dashboard.

schema.title: Response Get Institutional Stats Api V1 Stats Institutional Get

get.description: Get currently active classes based on timetable and current time.

schema.title: Response Get Live Classes Api V1 Classes Live Get

get.description: Get today's schedule for a specific class.

schema.title: Response Get Class Schedule Today Api V1 Classes  Class Id  Schedule Today Get
